creator: bugzilla.freebsd@omnilan.de
text:
(In reply to Niclas Zeising from comment #3)
As you can see in my comment, the issue is explained in this bug report too.
I'm aware of the solution.
Others might not, that's why I proposed to expand the default selection of the port x11-drivers/xorg-drivers by EVDEV.
Why?
Users are invited to deselect option DEVD in port x11-servers/xorg-server.
If they do so (because they heard about evdev and intentionally want to avoid libinput/devd utilazation), they end up with an locally unusable Xorg setup.

Do you think extending the default OPTIONS definition of x11-drivers/xorg-drivers is not needed?
That's what my report is about.
